author: IGN YouTube
text:
Brawlhalla x DreamWorks Animation Shrek - Official Crossover Event Announcement Trailer
Take a look at the announcement trailer for Brawlhalla  x DreamWorks Animation’s Shrek crossover event. Ubisoft, in collaboration with Universal Products & Experiences, announced the crossover event launching on July 29. This collaboration brings the films’ unforgettable characters—Shrek, Fiona, and Puss in Boots—from the beloved franchise to  Brawlhalla as playable characters, with Donkey as a Companion. The event will also include a Map featuring Shrek’s iconic Swamp and other items inspired by fairy tale creatures. Additional details on the crossover and those other Items will be shared at a later date. The Brawlhalla  x Shrek crossover event is launching on July 29.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Every Dragon in House of the Dragon - Recap (Watch Before Season 3!)
Here are all the House of the Dragon dragons and riders! From Caraxes to Vhagar, House of the Dragon is loaded with pet weapons of mass destruction. There are well over a dozen active dragons in the HBO Original show on Max, including several that are wild or unclaimed, so if you don't know your Meleys from your Syrax, don't worry, we've got you covered.

Here are all the House of the Dragon dragons that have appeared so far, and some that we might see in future episodes.

00:00 - Intro 
00:47 - Vhagar 
01:39 - Syrax 
02:07 - Caraxes
02:43 - Sunfyre 
03:28 - Vermithor 
04:30 - Silverwing 
04:57 - Meleys
05:52 - Moondancer 
06:25 - Seasmoke 
07:27 - Dreamfyre 
07:56 - Tessarion
08:35 - Vermax 
09:10 - Stormcloud 
09:40 - Arrax 
10:19 - Tyraxes
10:50 - Morghul 
11:05 - Shrykos
11:18 - Morning
11:58 - Sheepstealer
12:35 - The Cannibal 
12:52 - Grey Ghost
13:03 - Outro

#IGN #HouseOfTheDragon #GameOfThrones

author: IGN YouTube
text:
How The Series Keeps Ending (And Coming Back Anyway) | Toy Story Franchise Recap
Toy Story revolutionized filmmaking in 1995, becoming the first ever completely computer generated feature film. But more than that, it ushered in the great Pixar era of storytelling, where grown-up and often heartbreaking themes find their way into what present as kids stuff. The combination of slapstick fantasy with grounded emotional relevance has served that adorable lamp company well in the decades since, and nowhere is it more evident than Toy Story. Going on a fifth film (even though a lot of people would've been fine if it ended with a trilogy) a lot has happened to Woody, Buzz Lightyear and the gang across four movies. Luckily, you've got a friend in me, and I've got a recap for you! Here's all the Andy, Bonnie, destructive neighbors, claw-obsessed aliens, villainous teddy bears and spooky voiceless dolls you need to know, to catch up before Toy Story 5.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
My Cannibal Family - Official Announcement Trailer
You are the terror that lurks amongst the shadows. Take a look at the My Cannibal Family announcement trailer for this upcoming grotesque monster horror sim with co-op multiplayer for up to 4 players. Build a twisted theme park, then use traps and stealthy attacks to harvest guests within a deadly sandbox of your own creation! My Cannibal Family will be available on Steam, PlayStation 5 (PS5), and Xbox Series X/S in 2027.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Happy Bastards - Official Combat Demo Launch Trailer
Virtue? That’s for suckers. But fame? Priceless. Watch the latest Happy Bastards trailer to see gameplay from this upcoming open-world tactical RPG. Assemble unruly bastards into a mercenary squad and build your legend through reckless adventuring, bloody fights, lucrative looting, and dirty dealings. Choose your battles, and your allies, in this irreverent open-world tactical RPG. Happy Bastards will be available on PC. A combat demo is out now on Steam.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Freeline - Official Announcement Trailer
Check out the Announcement Trailer for Freeline, a stylized third-person parkour platformer developed by Piers. Players will embody Corrin, a spirited young cat on a mission to take down his city's corporate surveillance state and reclaim the rooftops. Freeline is coming soon to PC (Steam).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Slap Out Of It! - Official Announcement Trailer
Check out the Slap Out of It! announcement trailer for this upcoming slap-and-solve adventure that stretches your wits and your noodly arms in all directions. Explore impossible towers where every floor is a comedy sandbox of secrets. Meet strange characters and solve (or add to) their problems with a personal touch. The power to change everything is in your hands. Slap Out of It! will be available on PC and Consoles in 2027.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Beastfolk Barber - Official Announcement Trailer
Beastfolk Barber is set in a modern city where beastfolk live side by side with humans, navigating the tension between who they're expected to be and who they are. As their barber, you're someone they can open up to. With every conversation and every cut, you help them become who they truly are.
Head over to Steam and add the game to your wishlist.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Rustmourne - Official Gameplay Trailer | Upload VR Showcase 2026
Take a look at the Gameplay Trailer for Rustmourne, an upcoming sci-fi horror VR survival game. Players will traverse the corridors of an ancient, derelict structure, and face the tortured beings in it: hide, run, or cut off their limbs to survive. Rustmourne is coming soon to SteamVR.

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
The Wandering Village: The Last Leviathan - Official Announcement Trailer
A new DLC introducing a massive amphibian creature, complete with new buildings, resources, a different tech tree and hours of fresh content. Launching alongside it is a big free update that deepens the interaction with both Onbu and the new creature, adding new body temperature and mood mechanics, cosmetics, as well as the brand-new Arctic Ocean biome.
The Wandering Village: The Last Leviathan will be available on PC, PlayStation 4, PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch, and Nintendo Switch 2.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Caravana 2000 - Official Playtest Trailer
Choose your almost-famous costume and face the dangers of Brazilian chaotic nights. In this action roguelike, survive hordes, farm aura, wield sinister gadgets, and create insane combinations while dancing in the face of danger.
The Playtest for Caravana 2000 is available now. Head over to Steam and add the game to your wishlist.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Bomb The Hill - Official Release Window Trailer
Don't miss the Release Window Trailer for Bomb the Hill, a cinematic VR downhill skateboarding game developed by Poko Dzima VR Studio. Players will race down dangerous mountain roads, weave through traffic at insane speeds, battle desperate rivals, perform tricks, and survive brutal crashes. The game blends realistic downhill mechanics with atmospheric storytelling and a road-trip vibe. Bomb the Hill is launching in Summer 2026 for Meta Quest and Steam VR.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
BrushHammer: Miniature Painter - Official Gameplay Trailer | Upload VR Showcase 2026
BrushHammer is a mixed-reality game that lets you live the miniature painting hobby without spilling paint on your desk! Check out the Brushammer: Miniature Painter trailer to see gameplay from this upcoming game. Pick from a huge collection of minis, kitbash them with different parts and accessories, and paint them using awesome tools like spray cans, airbrushes, shading brushes, decals, and shiny coatings. Show off your masterpiece in your space, send pics to friends, and climb from total newbie to legendary painter in Career Mode. Complete commissions, impress picky judges, and spend your hard-earned points in the hobby shop on new tools, accessories, and upgrades for your creative setup. BrushHammer Miniature Painter will be available on Meta Quest.

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
There Are No Ghosts at the Grand - Official Behind-the-Scenes Clip
Join star Alex Brightman (Schmigadoon, Beetlejuice) for a behind-the-scenes look at There Are No Ghosts at the Grand in this latest video for the upcoming first-person story-driven musical, mystery game. Brightman discusses his role in the game as Chris, gives a peek at the story, your mission, and more about what you can expect. The new video also showcases gameplay. There Are No Ghosts at the Grand will be available on Steam, Xbox Series X/S, Xbox on PC, and Xbox Loud in Q4 2026. A demo is out now.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Lanesplit - Official VR Update Release Date Trailer | Upload VR Showcase 2026
Watch the latest Lanesplit trailer for this sports arcade racing game to see what's coming with the VR update, including a new manufacturer, new characters, and SteamVR support. Successfully slip through traffic in VR and avoid disastrous collisions to rack up points from a whole new perspective in Lanesplit. Redline all-new electric motorcycles with elite acceleration and top speed, navigate inclement weather with the addition of thunderstorms, and enjoy appearances from real-world motorcycle influencers. Lanesplit's VR update will be available on Steam on June 23, 2026.

#ign #gaming
